response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains — the core requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/prototype work (bachelor’s thesis) and outdated roles, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle, fixed-income systems, or banking domain expertise. His recent work is entirely in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, making him a poor fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in DevOps, CI/CD, and testing practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows in financial domain
Lacks demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience in production systems
No evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
